final:
module RefModule (
	input [1:0] in0,
	input [1:0] in1,
	input [1:0] in2,
	input [1:0] in3,
	input [1:0] sel,
	output [1:0] out);assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? in0 :
			  (sel == 2'b01) ? in1 :
			  (sel == 2'b10) ? in2 :
			  in3;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
